preReview.title: FC Dallas v Sporting Kansas City: 'We trust each other' – Acosta
preReview.description: FC Dallas battled to a 1-0 win over Real Salt Lake last time out, and now welcome Sporting Kansas City to Toyota Stadium.

QAData.question: Who won between FC Dallas and Sporting Kansas City on Sun, 30 Mar 2025 00:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: FC Dallas won 2–1 over Sporting Kansas City on Sun, 30 Mar 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
